name: Citrus Marinated Fruit
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry White Wine or Grape Juice
1 and 1/2 cups Green Grapes, seedless, halved
1 and 1/2 cups Strawberries, halved or whole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all marinade ingredients; mix well.
2. In a large bowl, combine all fruit except strawberries.
3. Pour the marinade over the fruit.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours, stirring occasionally, to blend flavors.
5. Just before serving, gently stir in the strawberries.
6. Garnish with fresh mint leaves if desired.
Makes 12 servings (1/2 cup each).
